name: com.fiatdock/fiatdock-mcp
title: FiatDock
description: Non-custodial USDC <-> bank for AI agents via x402 + Transak. Own funds only; PT + EU/EEA; 18+.

environmentVariables.name: AGENT_PRIVATE_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Agent wallet key that auto-pays the $0.05 USDC x402 fee for paid tools. Optional: free tools (get_quote, get_order_status) work without it. Use a dedicated low-balance wallet.
